description: Legacy callsite passes only one lane's data → analyzer produces same classification as before.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Single-lane data is treated as the only signal; no multi-lane consolidation attempted
rubric_hints.output_structure: Same shape as PR1 single-signal contract (no cross_lane_root_cause field needed)
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: Spec §3.14 backward compat: single-lane callsites unchanged
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: TIMEOUT_TIMING is correctly classified per existing 18-rule regex
